name: Van Gogh
description: Transforms images into a style reminiscent of Vincent van Gogh's post-impressionist paintings, with bold colors and expressive brush strokes.
prompt_fragment: in the style of Vincent van Gogh, with bold, swirling brush strokes and vibrant colors

name: Pixel Art
description: Converts images into a retro pixel art style with limited color palette and blocky pixelated aesthetic.
prompt_fragment: as pixel art, with blocky pixels and limited color palette, 8-bit retro aesthetic

name: Flat UI Icon
description: Simplifies images into modern flat design UI icons with solid colors, minimal details, and clean lines.
prompt_fragment: as a minimalist flat design UI icon, with solid colors, simple shapes, and no gradients or shadows

name: Neumorphic Button
description: Transforms elements into soft, extruded interfaces with subtle shadows and highlights creating a tactile, dimensional effect.
prompt_fragment: as a neumorphic UI element with soft shadows, subtle highlights, and extruded appearance against a light background

name: Glassmorphic Card
description: Converts designs into a modern glassmorphism style with frosted glass effect, transparency, and subtle borders.
prompt_fragment: as a glassmorphic UI element with frosted glass transparency, subtle blur, and thin light borders
